nodes.description: Scoped analytics schema.
nodes.name: retail_pod.analytics.retail_analytics

nodes.description: All data describing who shoppers are, where they live, and how they are segmented.
nodes.name: Customer

nodes.description: The merchandise catalog and inventory levels across fulfillment centers.
nodes.name: Product

nodes.description: Purchase transactions across store, online, and mail-order channels.
nodes.name: Sales

nodes.description: Item return and refund events across all commerce channels.
nodes.name: Returns & Refunds

nodes.description: Campaigns, promotions, mailer pages, and digital site content driving customer activity.
nodes.name: Marketing

nodes.description: Physical and digital infrastructure including stores, warehouses, support centers, and delivery methods.
nodes.name: Operations

nodes.description: Shared lookup and dimension tables for dates, times, addresses, and return reasons.
nodes.name: Reference & Time

nodes.description: Core customer account records linking identity, address, and demographic segments.
nodes.name: Shopper

nodes.description: Demographic and household profile dimensions used to classify and segment customers.
nodes.name: Customer Segmentation

nodes.description: Product catalog records describing every sellable item.
nodes.name: Merchandise

nodes.description: Daily stock-on-hand counts per product and fulfillment center.
nodes.name: Inventory

nodes.description: In-store purchase transactions at physical retail locations.
nodes.name: Store Sales

nodes.description: Purchase transactions completed through digital commerce properties.
nodes.name: Online Sales

nodes.description: Purchase transactions originating from catalog or mailer channels.
nodes.name: Mail-Order Sales

nodes.description: Item returns and refunds processed at physical retail stores.
nodes.name: Store Returns

nodes.description: Item returns and refunds processed through the digital commerce channel.
nodes.name: Online Returns

nodes.description: Item returns and refunds processed through the catalog or mailer channel.
nodes.name: Mail-Order Returns

nodes.description: Marketing promotions and offers run across channels.
nodes.name: Campaigns

nodes.description: Website pages and online properties used in digital commerce.
nodes.name: Digital Content

nodes.description: Catalog and mailer pages used in the mail-order channel.
nodes.name: Print Content

nodes.description: Physical store locations and their operational attributes.
nodes.name: Retail Infrastructure

nodes.description: Warehouse and distribution center locations used for inventory and shipping.
nodes.name: Fulfillment Infrastructure

nodes.description: Customer service center locations supporting mail-order and assisted commerce.
nodes.name: Support Infrastructure

nodes.description: Shipping and delivery method options available to customers.
nodes.name: Delivery

nodes.description: Calendar and clock reference tables for date and time-based analysis.
nodes.name: Time Dimensions

nodes.description: Address records shared across customers, stores, and warehouses.
nodes.name: Location Reference

nodes.description: Lookup codes and descriptions explaining why customers return items.
nodes.name: Return Reference

nodes.description: Lookup table defining household income bands for economic segmentation.
nodes.name: Income Reference

nodes.description: Physical and mailing address records used for geographic segmentation across customers, stores, and warehouses.
nodes.grain: One row per unique address
nodes.name: addresses

nodes.description: Date dimension covering every calendar day from 1900 to 2100 with fiscal, holiday, and comparison period attributes.
nodes.grain: One row per calendar day
nodes.name: calendar_days

nodes.description: Demographic segment combinations covering gender, marital status, education, credit rating, and dependent counts.
nodes.grain: One row per unique demographic segment combination
nodes.name: client_profiles

nodes.description: Central shopper account records linking each person to their address, demographic profile, and purchase tenure.
nodes.grain: One row per customer account
nodes.name: clients

nodes.description: Time-of-day dimension with one record per second, including shift, sub-shift, and meal period attributes.
nodes.grain: One row per second of the day
nodes.name: clock_times

nodes.description: Shipping and delivery option records including service type, transport mode, carrier, and contract.
nodes.grain: One row per delivery method
nodes.name: delivery_methods

nodes.description: Warehouse and distribution center records with address and size details.
nodes.grain: One row per fulfillment center
nodes.name: fulfillment_centers

nodes.description: Household-level segments capturing income range, buying potential, dependent count, and vehicle ownership.
nodes.grain: One row per unique household segment combination
nodes.name: household_profiles

nodes.description: Reference table defining 20 household income bands with lower and upper dollar boundaries.
nodes.grain: One row per income band
nodes.name: income_ranges

nodes.description: Line-item sales through the mail-order catalog channel with pricing, discounts, delivery costs, and profitability.
nodes.grain: One row per line item per mail-order transaction
nodes.name: mail_order_purchases

nodes.description: Item returns processed through the mail-order channel with refund amounts, return reasons, and financial impact.
nodes.grain: One row per returned line item from a mail-order transaction
nodes.name: mail_order_refunds

nodes.description: Catalog and mailer page records linking print promotions to merchandise departments and active date ranges.
nodes.grain: One row per page within a mailer issue
nodes.name: mailer_pages

nodes.description: Campaign records describing promotions, their channels, timing, associated products, and budget costs.
nodes.grain: One row per marketing campaign
nodes.name: marketing_campaigns

nodes.description: Product catalog records with brand, category, class, pricing, size, color, and manufacturer attributes.
nodes.grain: One row per product version (slowly changing)
nodes.name: merchandise

nodes.description: Website and digital commerce property records with site identity, market, company, and tax details.
nodes.grain: One row per website property version (slowly changing)
nodes.name: online_properties

nodes.description: Line-item sales through digital commerce properties with pricing, discounts, shipping, tax, and profitability.
nodes.grain: One row per line item per online order
nodes.name: online_purchases

nodes.description: Item returns processed through the online channel with refund amounts, return reasons, and financial impact.
nodes.grain: One row per returned line item from an online order
nodes.name: online_refunds

nodes.description: Physical store records with address, size, staffing, market, and tax details.
nodes.grain: One row per store version (slowly changing)
nodes.name: retail_locations

nodes.description: Reference list of reason codes and descriptions explaining why customers return purchased items.
nodes.grain: One row per return reason code
nodes.name: return_reasons

nodes.description: Website page records describing page type, URL, creation date, and content volume.
nodes.grain: One row per website page version (slowly changing)
nodes.name: site_pages

nodes.description: Daily quantity-on-hand snapshots for each product at each fulfillment center.
nodes.grain: One row per product per fulfillment center per calendar day
nodes.name: stock_levels

nodes.description: Line-item sales at physical retail stores with pricing, discounts, tax, and profit details.
nodes.grain: One row per line item per store purchase transaction
nodes.name: store_purchases

nodes.description: Item returns processed at physical stores with refund amounts, return reasons, and financial impact.
nodes.grain: One row per returned line item at a store
nodes.name: store_refunds

nodes.description: Customer service center records with address, staffing, operating hours, and market details.
nodes.grain: One row per support center version (slowly changing)
nodes.name: support_centers

nodes.description: Business-facing code that uniquely identifies an address.
nodes.name: address_code

nodes.description: Internal unique identifier for each address record.
nodes.name: address_record

nodes.description: City for the client address.
nodes.name: city

nodes.description: Country for the client address. All records are United States.
nodes.name: country

nodes.description: The county associated with the client's address.
nodes.name: county

nodes.description: The type of dwelling at the address, such as apartment, condo, or single family home.
nodes.name: location_type

nodes.description: US state abbreviation for the client address.
nodes.name: state

nodes.description: The name of the street for the client's address.
nodes.name: street_name

nodes.description: The numeric portion of the street address, such as a house or building number.
nodes.name: street_number

nodes.description: The type or suffix of the street, such as Avenue, Boulevard, or Road.
nodes.name: street_type

nodes.description: The suite or unit designation within a building, if applicable.
nodes.name: suite_number

nodes.description: UTC timezone offset for the address location, ranging from -10 to -5 hours.
nodes.name: timezone_offset

nodes.description: Postal ZIP code for the client address.
nodes.name: zip

nodes.description: The actual calendar date for this record.
nodes.name: calendar_day

nodes.description: Business-facing code that uniquely identifies a calendar day.
nodes.name: calendar_day_code

nodes.description: Internal unique identifier for each calendar day record.
nodes.name: calendar_day_record

nodes.description: Flags whether this date is today (Y/N). All values are currently N in this dataset.
nodes.name: current_day

nodes.description: Flags whether this date falls in the current calendar month (Y/N).
nodes.name: current_month

nodes.description: Flags whether this date falls in the current calendar quarter (Y/N).
nodes.name: current_quarter

nodes.description: Flags whether this date falls in the current week (Y/N). All values are currently N in this dataset.
nodes.name: current_week

nodes.description: Flags whether this date falls in the current calendar year (Y/N).
nodes.name: current_year

nodes.description: The full name of the day of the week, such as Monday or Friday.
nodes.name: day_name

nodes.description: The day number within the month, from 1 to 31.
nodes.name: day_of_month

nodes.description: Numeric day of the week, where 0 through 6 represent the days Sunday through Saturday (or similar convention).
nodes.name: day_of_week

nodes.description: Reference to the first day of the month containing this date.
nodes.name: first_day_of_month

nodes.description: A sequential number identifying the fiscal quarter across all fiscal years.
nodes.name: fiscal_quarter_sequence

nodes.description: A sequential number identifying the fiscal week across all fiscal years.
nodes.name: fiscal_week_sequence

nodes.description: The fiscal year associated with the calendar date.
nodes.name: fiscal_year

nodes.description: Indicates whether the date immediately follows a public holiday (Y/N).
nodes.name: following_holiday

nodes.description: Indicates whether the date is a public holiday (Y/N).
nodes.name: holiday

nodes.description: Reference to the last day of the month containing this date.
nodes.name: last_day_of_month

nodes.description: Month number within the year, from 1 (January) to 12 (December).
nodes.name: month_of_year

nodes.description: A sequential number identifying the month across all years in the calendar.
nodes.name: month_sequence

nodes.description: A human-readable label for the calendar quarter, such as '2024Q3'.
nodes.name: quarter_name

nodes.description: The quarter number within the calendar year, from 1 (Q1) to 4 (Q4).
nodes.name: quarter_of_year

nodes.description: A sequential number identifying the quarter across all years in the calendar.
nodes.name: quarter_sequence

nodes.description: Reference to the equivalent date one quarter prior, for quarter-over-quarter comparison.
nodes.name: same_day_last_quarter

nodes.description: Reference to the equivalent date one year prior, for year-over-year comparison.
nodes.name: same_day_last_year

nodes.description: A sequential number identifying the week across all years in the calendar.
nodes.name: week_sequence

nodes.description: Indicates whether the date falls on a weekend (Y/N).
nodes.name: weekend

nodes.description: Calendar year for the date record.
nodes.name: year

nodes.description: Internal unique identifier for each client demographic profile record.
nodes.name: client_profile_record

nodes.description: Client credit rating segment: Good, Low Risk, High Risk, or Unknown.
nodes.name: credit_rating

nodes.description: Number of dependents in the client's household currently attending college, from 0 to 6.
nodes.name: dependent_college_count

nodes.description: Total number of dependents in the client's household, from 0 to 6.
nodes.name: dependent_count

nodes.description: Number of employed dependents in the client's household, from 0 to 6.
nodes.name: dependent_employed_count

nodes.description: Client education segment, ranging from Primary through Advanced Degree.
nodes.name: education_status

nodes.description: Client gender segment: Male (M) or Female (F).
nodes.name: gender

nodes.description: Client marital status segment: Single, Married, Divorced, Widowed, or Unknown.
nodes.name: marital_status

nodes.description: Estimated annual purchase amount for the client, in dollars.
nodes.name: purchase_estimate

nodes.description: Country where the customer was born, used for demographic and geographic analysis.
nodes.name: birth_country

nodes.description: Day of the month the customer was born, used for birthday-based analysis.
nodes.name: birth_day

nodes.description: Month the customer was born, used for age and birthday analysis.
nodes.name: birth_month

nodes.description: Year the customer was born, used to calculate age and generational segments.
nodes.name: birth_year

nodes.description: Business-facing customer identifier used to reference a shopper across systems.
nodes.name: client_code

nodes.description: Internal system identifier uniquely identifying each client record.
nodes.name: client_record

nodes.description: Links the client to their current mailing or residential address.
nodes.name: current_address_ref

nodes.description: Links the client to their active demographic profile record.
nodes.name: current_client_profile_ref

nodes.description: Links the client to their active household profile record.
nodes.name: current_household_profile_ref

nodes.description: Customer's email address used for digital communications and account identification.
nodes.name: email_address

nodes.description: Customer's first or given name.
nodes.name: first_name

nodes.description: Calendar day of the customer's first purchase, indicating when they first bought from the business.
nodes.name: first_sale_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: Calendar day of the customer's first shipment, indicating when they first received an order.
nodes.name: first_shipping_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: Customer's last name or surname.
nodes.name: last_name

nodes.description: Calendar day of the most recent review or account assessment for the customer.
nodes.name: last_review_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: Customer's login or username for online account access.
nodes.name: login

nodes.description: Indicates whether the customer is a preferred or loyalty-tier shopper.
nodes.name: preferred_client_flag

nodes.description: Customer's preferred title or salutation, such as Mr., Mrs., Dr., or Ms.
nodes.name: salutation

nodes.description: Indicates whether the time falls in the AM or PM half of the day.
nodes.name: am_pm

nodes.description: Numeric representation of the time of day in seconds since midnight.
nodes.name: clock_time

nodes.description: Business-facing alphanumeric code identifying each second-level time record.
nodes.name: clock_time_code

nodes.description: Internal system identifier uniquely identifying each second-level time record.
nodes.name: clock_time_record

nodes.description: Hour of the day (0–23) for time-of-day analysis.
nodes.name: hour

nodes.description: Meal period associated with the time of day, such as breakfast, lunch, or dinner.
nodes.name: meal_clock_time

nodes.description: Minute within the hour (0–59) for time-of-day analysis.
nodes.name: minute

nodes.description: Second within the minute (0–59) for precise time-of-day analysis.
nodes.name: second

nodes.description: Work shift period (first, second, or third) associated with the time of day.
nodes.name: shift

nodes.description: Finer time-of-day period such as morning, afternoon, evening, or night.
nodes.name: sub_shift

nodes.description: Name of the shipping carrier or logistics provider for the delivery method.
nodes.name: carrier

nodes.description: Transport mode code for the delivery method, such as Air, Sea, or Surface.
nodes.name: code

nodes.description: Contract identifier associated with the carrier agreement for this delivery method.
nodes.name: contract

nodes.description: Business-facing alphanumeric code identifying each delivery method.
nodes.name: delivery_method_code

nodes.description: Internal system identifier uniquely identifying each delivery method record.
nodes.name: delivery_method_record

nodes.description: Delivery service type or speed, such as Express, Next Day, Overnight, or Regular.
nodes.name: type

nodes.description: City where the fulfillment center is located.
nodes.name: city

nodes.description: Country where the fulfillment center is located.
nodes.name: country

nodes.description: County where the fulfillment center is located.
nodes.name: county

nodes.description: Business-facing alphanumeric code identifying each fulfillment center or warehouse.
nodes.name: fulfillment_center_code

nodes.description: Internal system identifier uniquely identifying each fulfillment center record.
nodes.name: fulfillment_center_record

nodes.description: US state where the fulfillment center is located.
nodes.name: state

nodes.description: Street name of the fulfillment center's physical address.
nodes.name: street_name

nodes.description: Street number of the fulfillment center's physical address.
nodes.name: street_number

nodes.description: Street type suffix for the fulfillment center's address, such as Avenue, Drive, or Parkway.
nodes.name: street_type

nodes.description: Suite or unit number within the fulfillment center's building address.
nodes.name: suite_number

nodes.description: UTC timezone offset for the fulfillment center's location.
nodes.name: timezone_offset

nodes.description: Name of the fulfillment center or warehouse facility.
nodes.name: warehouse_name

nodes.description: Physical size of the warehouse in square feet.
nodes.name: warehouse_square_ft

nodes.description: Postal ZIP code of the fulfillment center's location.
nodes.name: zip

nodes.description: Estimated annual spending potential of the household, expressed as a dollar range such as '0-500', '1001-5000', or '>10000'.
nodes.name: buy_potential

nodes.description: Number of dependents in the household, ranging from 0 to 9.
nodes.name: dependent_count

nodes.description: Internal unique identifier for each household profile segment record.
nodes.name: household_profile_record

nodes.description: Links the household profile to an income band in the income_ranges table, indicating the household's estimated annual income tier.
nodes.name: income_range_ref

nodes.description: Number of vehicles owned by the household, with -1 indicating unknown or not applicable.
nodes.name: vehicle_count

nodes.description: Internal unique identifier for each income band record in the income_ranges reference table.
nodes.name: income_range_record

nodes.description: The minimum annual household income (in dollars) for this income band, e.g., $0, $10,001, $20,001.
nodes.name: lower_bound

nodes.description: The maximum annual household income (in dollars) for this income band, e.g., $10,000, $20,000, up to $200,000.
nodes.name: upper_bound

nodes.description: The billing address associated with the mail-order purchase, linking to the addresses table.
nodes.name: billing_address_ref

nodes.description: The demographic profile of the billing customer at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the client_profiles table.
nodes.name: billing_client_profile_ref

nodes.description: The customer account responsible for payment on the mail-order purchase, linking to the clients table.
nodes.name: billing_client_ref

nodes.description: The household segment of the billing customer at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the household_profiles table.
nodes.name: billing_household_profile_ref

nodes.description: The marketing campaign or promotional offer associated with the mail-order purchase, linking to the marketing_campaigns table.
nodes.name: campaign_ref

nodes.description: The total coupon or voucher savings applied to this mail-order line item.
nodes.name: coupon_amount

nodes.description: The shipping or delivery method used for the mail-order order, linking to the delivery_methods table.
nodes.name: delivery_method_ref

nodes.description: The total shipping or delivery cost charged for this mail-order line item.
nodes.name: extended_delivery_cost

nodes.description: The total discount applied across all units in this mail-order line item (quantity × per-unit discount).
nodes.name: extended_discount_amount

nodes.description: The total value of this mail-order line item at the full list price before discounts (quantity × list price).
nodes.name: extended_list_price

nodes.description: The total revenue from this mail-order line item at the actual sales price (quantity × sales price).
nodes.name: extended_sales_price

nodes.description: The total tax amount applied to this mail-order line item.
nodes.name: extended_tax

nodes.description: The total wholesale cost for this mail-order line item (quantity × wholesale cost per unit).
nodes.name: extended_wholesale_cost

nodes.description: The warehouse or fulfillment center that shipped the mail-order order, linking to the fulfillment_centers table.
nodes.name: fulfillment_center_ref

nodes.description: The standard retail or catalog list price per unit for the product in this mail-order line item.
nodes.name: list_price

nodes.description: The catalog or mailer page that prompted the mail-order purchase, linking to the mailer_pages table.
nodes.name: mailer_page_ref

nodes.description: The product sold in the mail-order transaction, linking to the merchandise catalog table.
nodes.name: merchandise_ref

nodes.description: The net amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, excluding tax and delivery charges.
nodes.name: net_paid

nodes.description: The net amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, including delivery charges but excluding tax.
nodes.name: net_paid_with_delivery

nodes.description: The fully loaded amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, including both delivery charges and tax.
nodes.name: net_paid_with_delivery_tax

nodes.description: The net amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, including tax but excluding delivery charges.
nodes.name: net_paid_with_tax

nodes.description: The profit or loss on this mail-order line item, calculated as net revenue minus wholesale cost.
nodes.name: net_profit

nodes.description: The mail-order order identifier, grouping multiple line items that belong to the same customer order.
nodes.name: order_number

nodes.description: The number of units of the product ordered in this mail-order line item.
nodes.name: quantity

nodes.description: The calendar date when the mail-order purchase was placed, linking to the calendar_days reference table.
nodes.name: sale_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: The time of day when the mail-order purchase was placed, linking to the clock_times reference table.
nodes.name: sale_clock_time_ref

nodes.description: The actual per-unit price charged to the customer for the product in this mail-order line item, after discounts.
nodes.name: sales_price

nodes.description: The delivery address for the mail-order shipment, linking to the addresses table.
nodes.name: shipping_address_ref

nodes.description: The calendar date when the mail-order purchase was shipped, linking to the calendar_days reference table.
nodes.name: shipping_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: The demographic profile of the shipping recipient at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the client_profiles table.
nodes.name: shipping_client_profile_ref

nodes.description: The customer account receiving the mail-order shipment, linking to the clients table.
nodes.name: shipping_client_ref

nodes.description: The household segment of the shipping recipient at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the household_profiles table.
nodes.name: shipping_household_profile_ref

nodes.description: The customer support or call center that handled the mail-order purchase, linking to the support_centers table.
nodes.name: support_center_ref

nodes.description: The per-unit cost paid by the business to acquire the product for this mail-order line item.
nodes.name: wholesale_cost

nodes.description: The shipping or delivery method used for the return.
nodes.name: delivery_method_ref

nodes.description: A processing or restocking fee charged to the customer for the mail-order return.
nodes.name: fee

nodes.description: The fulfillment center or warehouse that received the returned item.
nodes.name: fulfillment_center_ref

nodes.description: The catalog or mailer page associated with the returned item.
nodes.name: mailer_page_ref

nodes.description: The product item that was returned in this mail-order refund.
nodes.name: merchandise_ref

nodes.description: The total financial loss to the business from this mail-order return.
nodes.name: net_loss

nodes.description: The mail-order order number associated with this return.
nodes.name: order_number

nodes.description: The mailing address of the customer who received the refund.
nodes.name: refunded_address_ref

nodes.description: The portion of the refund paid back to the customer as cash.
nodes.name: refunded_cash

nodes.description: The demographic profile of the customer who received the refund.
nodes.name: refunded_client_profile_ref

nodes.description: The customer who received the refund payment for the returned mail-order item.
nodes.name: refunded_client_ref

nodes.description: The household profile of the customer who received the refund.
nodes.name: refunded_household_profile_ref

nodes.description: The gross refund amount before tax for the returned mail-order items.
nodes.name: return_amount

nodes.description: The total refund amount including tax for the returned mail-order items.
nodes.name: return_amount_with_tax

nodes.description: The calendar date when the mail-order return was processed.
nodes.name: return_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: The time of day when the mail-order return was processed.
nodes.name: return_clock_time_ref

nodes.description: The shipping cost incurred to return the mail-order item.
nodes.name: return_delivery_cost

nodes.description: The number of units returned in this mail-order refund transaction.
nodes.name: return_quantity

nodes.description: The reason the customer returned the mail-order item.
nodes.name: return_reason_ref

nodes.description: The tax portion of the mail-order refund amount.
nodes.name: return_tax

nodes.description: The address of the customer who physically returned the item.
nodes.name: returning_address_ref

nodes.description: The demographic profile of the customer who physically returned the item.
nodes.name: returning_client_profile_ref

nodes.description: The customer who physically sent the item back.
nodes.name: returning_client_ref

nodes.description: The household profile of the customer who physically returned the item.
nodes.name: returning_household_profile_ref

nodes.description: The portion of the refund issued as a charge reversal or credit card chargeback.
nodes.name: reversed_charge

nodes.description: The portion of the refund issued as store credit or account credit.
nodes.name: store_credit

nodes.description: The customer support center that handled this mail-order return.
nodes.name: support_center_ref

nodes.description: The merchandise department featured on this mailer page.
nodes.name: department

nodes.description: A free-text description of the content featured on this mailer page.
nodes.name: description

nodes.description: The last date the mailer or catalog containing this page was active.
nodes.name: end_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: The catalog or mailer edition number this page belongs to.
nodes.name: mailer_number

nodes.description: Business-facing code that uniquely identifies a mailer page.
nodes.name: mailer_page_code

nodes.description: The page number within the catalog or mailer.
nodes.name: mailer_page_number

nodes.description: Internal row identifier for each mailer page record.
nodes.name: mailer_page_record

nodes.description: The first date the mailer or catalog containing this page was active.
nodes.name: start_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: The publication frequency or cadence of the mailer containing this page.
nodes.name: type

nodes.description: Business-facing alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies each marketing campaign.
nodes.name: campaign_code

nodes.description: The name or label assigned to the marketing campaign.
nodes.name: campaign_name

nodes.description: Internal row identifier for each marketing campaign record.
nodes.name: campaign_record

nodes.description: Free-text description providing additional details about the campaign's channel or messaging approach.
nodes.name: channel_details

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the direct mail channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_direct_mail

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the email channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_email

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used an event-based channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_event

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the catalog mailer channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_mailer

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the press or print media channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_press

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used profile-based or targeted demographic channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_profile

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the radio channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_radio

nodes.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the television channel (Y/N).
nodes.name: channel_tv

nodes.description: The total budget or spend associated with running this marketing campaign.
nodes.name: cost

nodes.description: Indicates whether a discount was active during this campaign (Y/N).
nodes.name: discount_active

nodes.description: The calendar day when the campaign ended, linked to the calendar_days reference table.
nodes.name: end_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: The product promoted by this campaign, linked to the merchandise table.
nodes.name: merchandise_ref

nodes.description: The stated purpose or objective of the marketing campaign.
nodes.name: purpose

nodes.description: The target number of customer responses expected from this campaign.
nodes.name: response_target

nodes.description: The calendar day when the campaign began, linked to the calendar_days reference table.
nodes.name: start_calendar_day_ref

nodes.description: The brand name of the product.
nodes.name: brand

nodes.description: Numeric code identifying the product's brand, used for joining or grouping by brand.
nodes.name: brand_code

nodes.description: The top-level product category, such as Books, Electronics, Shoes, or Women.
nodes.name: category

nodes.description: Numeric code identifying the product's top-level category.
nodes.name: category_code

nodes.description: The product class or sub-grouping, such as kids, shirts, fragrances, or swimwear.
nodes.name: class

nodes.description: Numeric code identifying the product's class or sub-grouping within a category.
nodes.name: class_code

nodes.description: The color of the product.
